description: Sensors at the city landfill report rising methane gas levels, requiring an operator to activate the gas flare system.

nodes.task_description: Receive a 'High Methane Level' alert from the landfill monitoring system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent acknowledges the environmental safety alert.

nodes.task_description: Verify the readings from multiple sensors to confirm the high methane levels are widespread.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the validity of the alert.

nodes.task_description: Remotely activate the landfill's gas flare system to safely burn off the excess methane.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully activates the flare system.
